descript.abstract: stop_id: Stop ID found on physical transit stops.stop_code: Stop code used for HART stop identification (these values match the stop_id)stop_name: Name of transit stop.stop_lat: Latitude coordinate for transit stop.stop_long: Longitude coordinate for transit stop.
descript.purpose: Point representation of HART Stop Locations

idinfo.useconst: HART regularly updates route alignments and bus stops as part of service changes that occur at least three (3) times a year. HART works to keep updated data and shapefiles on these changes so they are reflected. For questions, please contact Omar Peerzada, AICP at peerzadao@gohart.org.

metainfo.metstdn: FGDC Content Standard for Digital Geospatial Metadata
